title: Dataset_PCR files_Velez et al.
author: Velez, Rita
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This dataset includes real-time PCR plates and readouts to support the Results presented in the manuscript authored by Velez R, Pina, B, Marques J and Silveira H, and entitled "Duplex real-time PCR based on Y chromosome-specific genes for high throughput direct sexing of  Anopheles  immature instars".
steps_raw: This dataset includes real-time PCR plates and readouts to support the Results presented in the manuscript authored by Velez R, Pina, B, Marques J and Silveira H, and entitled "Duplex real-time PCR based on Y chromosome-specific genes for high throughput direct sexing of  Anopheles  immature instars".
